insight: Adaptive selection from iter154 productive strata closed the benchmark-size shortfall efficiently: 12 processed candidates produced 3 additional execution-verified both-miss rows, raising the seed+expansion pool to 40 rows. The launch also exposed and fixed a schema-compatibility gap between selection_rank and adaptive_selection_rank.
next_action: Pre-register and run a zero-spend v1 release-manifest gate that joins seed-v0, iter154, and iter155 rows into a hash-checked benchmark artifact before claiming any released benchmark; then resume the paper readability pass with the new claim boundary.
